summary: The AI agent failed to effectively handle the medication refill request, resulting in a lack of engagement and failure to verify patient identity.

issues.title: Failure to Verify Patient Identity
issues.details: The agent did not verify the patient's identity despite the patient providing their name and date of birth, which is critical for handling medication requests.
issues.expected: The agent should have confirmed the patient's identity by asking for additional identifying information or confirming the details provided.

issues.title: Inability to Process Request
issues.details: The agent failed to acknowledge the patient's request for a medication refill and did not provide any information about the refill process or pharmacy details.
issues.expected: The agent should have acknowledged the refill request and provided information on how to proceed with the refill.

issues.title: Premature Call Termination
issues.details: The agent indicated it would end the call without addressing the patient's request, which is unprofessional and does not fulfill the purpose of the call.
issues.expected: The agent should have continued the conversation until the patient's request was addressed or clarified.
